commentaries.author: George Leo Haydock
commentaries.content: Jews: the three children whom they viewed with a jealous eye. Daniel was too much exalted, or was absent with other Jews.

commentaries.author: Jerome
commentaries.content: accused: They were envious of these Jews because they had been in charge of the king's business in Babylon, and also they were offended by their foreign religion and aversion towards idols.

commentaries.author: Jerome
commentaries.content: They were envious of these Jews because they had been in charge of the king's business in Babylon, and also they were offended by their foreign religion and aversion towards idols. They therefore find a pretext for accusing them to the king. The final consequence ensues.

methodology.step_1: Parse main page with BeautifulSoup for structure
methodology.step_3: Use Firecrawl to get full content from 'Go to Commentary' links
methodology.step_4: Fallback to BeautifulSoup for accordion content if needed
advantages: Records verses even without commentaries for complete tracking
